properties.description: Notebook to load data from bronze to Silver Layer and a gold layer with only the latest data

source:
# ============================================================
# TERMINAL CONFIGURATION
# ============================================================

storage_account = "navispowerbidatastorage2"

terminal_folder  = client_id.lower()

# Terminal-specific configurations
TERMINAL_CONFIG = {
    "Malta": {
        "client_key": 101,
        "column_mappings":{"unit_hazardous":"Unit Hazardous:0"},
        "datetime_formats": [
            'dd/MM/yyyy H:mm',
            'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm',
            'dd/MM/yyyy H:mm:ss',
            'dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm:ss',
            'dd/MM/yyyy H:m',
            'dd/MM/yyyy H:m:ss'
        ],
        "yard_position": {
            "prefix": "Y",
            "pattern": "full",
            "regex_full": r"^Y-([A-Z0-9]+)-([A-Z0-9]+)\s([A-Z0-9]+)\s([A-Z0-9]+)([A-Z])$",
            "regex_short": r"^Y-([A-Z0-9]+)-([A-Z0-9]+)$",
            "tier_type": "letter"
        },
        "vessel_position": {
            "prefix": "V",
            "regex": r"^V-([0-9]+)-([0-9]+)$",
            "slot_length": 6,
            "tier_type": "number"
        },
        "truck_position": {
    "prefix": "T",
    "regex":            r"^T-([A-Z0-9]+)-(TIP)-([A-Z])$",         # T-3004272-TIP-Y
    "regex_suffix":     r"^T-([A-Z0-9]+)-([A-Z])\s*(\(.*\))?$",   # T-3001804-Y (OUT)
    "regex_num_suffix": r"^T-([A-Z0-9]+)-([0-9]+)\s*\(.*\)$",     # T-600-2 (TIP)
    "regex_plain":      r"^T-([A-Z0-9]+?)(?:\s*\(.*\))?$",        # T-3001804, T-2978170 (OUT)
    "regex_text":       r"^T-([A-Z0-9_]+)$"                        # T-GEN_TRUCK
},

         "weight_class_thresholds": [
            (0,     "WC1"),
            (10000, "WC2"),
            (15000, "WC3"),
            (20000, "WC4"),
            (25000, "WC5"),
        ],
         "equip_class_map": {"2200":"2200","2210":"2200","2270":"2270","4260":"4260","4400":"4500","4500":"4500",
         "4510":"4500","4530":"4530","22G0":"2200","22G1":"2200","22G2":"2200","22P3":"2260","22R1":"2230","22T0":"2270",
         "22T6":"2270","22U0":"2250","22U1":"2250","22V0":"2200","25G1":"2500","42G0":"4200","42G1":"4200","42P0":"4260",
         "42P2":"4260","42P3":"4260","42U0":"4250","42U1":"4250","42U5":"4250","45G0":"4500","45G1":"4500","45P3":"4560",
         "45R0":"4530","45R1":"4530","45R4":"4530","45U0":"4550","45U1":"4520","4EG1":"4550","L5G0":"9500","L5G1":"9500","LEG0":"9500","LEG1":"9500"},

    },
    
    "GPA": {
        "client_key": 102,
        "column_mappings":{"unit_hazardous":"Unit Hazardous?"},
        "datetime_formats": [
            'MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm',
            'MM/dd/yyyy H:mm',
            'MM/dd/yyyy H:mm:ss',
            'MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss',
            'MM/dd/yyyy H:m',
            'MM/dd/yyyy H:m:ss'
        ],
        "yard_position": {
            "prefix": "Y",
            "separator": ".",
            "patterns": [
                {
                    "name": "full_detailed",
                    "regex": r"^Y-([A-Z0-9]+)-([0-9]+)\.([0-9]+)\.([A-Z])\.([0-9]+)$",
                    "groups": ["terminal_code", "bay", "row", "tier", "height"]
                },
                {
                    "name": "simple_location",
                    "regex": r"^Y-([A-Z0-9]+)-([A-Z0-9]+)$",
                    "groups": ["terminal_code", "location_code"]
                }
            ],
            "tier_type": "number"
        },
        "vessel_position": {
            "prefix": "V",
            "regex": r"^V-([A-Z0-9]+)-([0-9]+)$",
            "slot_length": 6,
            "tier_type": "number"
        },
       "truck_position": {
    "prefix": "T",
    "regex":            r"^T-([A-Z0-9]+)-(TIP)-([A-Z])$",         # T-3004272-TIP-Y
    "regex_suffix":     r"^T-([A-Z0-9]+)-([A-Z])\s*(\(.*\))?$",   # T-3001804-Y (OUT)
    "regex_num_suffix": r"^T-([A-Z0-9]+)-([0-9]+)\s*\(.*\)$",     # T-600-2 (TIP)
    "regex_plain":      r"^T-([A-Z0-9]+?)(?:\s*\(.*\))?$",        # T-3001804, T-2978170 (OUT)
    "regex_text":       r"^T-([A-Z0-9_]+)$"                        # T-GEN_TRUCK
},


        "rail_position": {
            "prefix": "R",
            "regex": r"^R-([A-Z0-9]+)-([A-Z]+[0-9]+)$"
        },
        "weight_class_thresholds": [
            (0,     "WC1"),
            (10000, "WC2"),
            (15000, "WC3"),
            (20000, "WC4"),
            (25000, "WC5"),
        ],
         "equip_class_map": {"2200":"2200","2210":"2200","2270":"2270","4260":"4260","4400":"4500","4500":"4500",
         "4510":"4500","4530":"4530","22G0":"2200","22G1":"2200","22G2":"2200","22P3":"2260","22R1":"2230","22T0":"2270",
         "22T6":"2270","22U0":"2250","22U1":"2250","22V0":"2200","25G1":"2500","42G0":"4200","42G1":"4200","42P0":"4260",
         "42P2":"4260","42P3":"4260","42U0":"4250","42U1":"4250","42U5":"4250","45G0":"4500","45G1":"4500","45P3":"4560",
         "45R0":"4530","45R1":"4530","45R4":"4530","45U0":"4550","45U1":"4520","4EG1":"4550","L5G0":"9500","L5G1":"9500","LEG0":"9500","LEG1":"9500"}
    },
    "MICT": {
    "client_key": 103,   # ← update with correct key
    "column_mappings": {
        "unit_hazardous": "Unit Hazardous?"   # ← confirm correct column name
    },
    "datetime_formats": [
        'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS',
        'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss',
        'yyyy-MM-dd H:mm:ss.SSS',
        'yyyy-MM-dd H:mm:ss',
    ],
    "yard_position": {
        "prefix": "Y",
        "separator": "",          # No separator — positions are parsed by character offset
        "tier_type": "number",    # Tier is always numeric (1, 2 etc.)
        # Group structure:
        # ^Y-([A-Z0-9]+)-([A-Z0-9]{2})([A-Z0-9]{2,4})([A-Z])([0-9])$
        #     group1=MICT  group2=Bay   group3=Row      group4=Tier  group5=TierNum
        #
        # 6-char: Y-MICT-0F05A1   → group2=0F, group3=05,   group4=A, group5=1
        # 8-char: Y-MICT-1N1920D2 → group2=1N, group3=1920, group4=D, group5=2
        "regex_full":  r"^Y-([A-Z0-9]+)-([A-Z0-9]{2})([A-Z0-9]{2,4})([A-Z])([0-9])$",
        "regex_short": r"^Y-([A-Z0-9]+)-([A-Z0-9]{2,8})$"
    },
    "vessel_position": {
        "prefix": "V",
        # Same structure as GPA/Malta — alphanumeric vessel ID, numeric slot
        # V-CLEA107B-110304   → group1=CLEA107B,    group2=110304
        # V-CPDP0XLBKN1-010010 → group1=CPDP0XLBKN1, group2=010010
        "regex": r"^V-([A-Z0-9]+)-([0-9]+)$",
        "slot_length": 6,
        "tier_type": "number"
    },
    "truck_position": {
        "prefix": "T",
        # Pattern 1 (TIP)        : T-{ID}-TIP-{letter}      → T-3004272-TIP-Y
        "regex":            r"^T-([A-Z0-9]+)-(TIP)-([A-Z])$",
        # Pattern 2 (suffix)     : T-{ID}-{letter} (*)       → T-3001804-Y (OUT)
        "regex_suffix":     r"^T-([A-Z0-9]+)-([A-Z])\s*(\(.*\))?$",
        # Pattern 3 (num_letter) : T-{ID}-{number}-{letter}  → T-094763-2-Y, T-CBQ7547-2-Y (TIP)
        "regex_num_letter": r"^T-([A-Z0-9]+)-([0-9]+)-([A-Z])\s*(\(.*\))?$",
        # Pattern 4 (num_suffix) : T-{ID}-{number} (*)       → T-600-2 (TIP)
        "regex_num_suffix": r"^T-([A-Z0-9]+)-([0-9]+)\s*\(.*\)$",
        # Pattern 5 (plain)      : T-{ID} or T-{ID} (*)      → T-10130565 (TIP), T-3001804
        "regex_plain":      r"^T-([A-Z0-9]+?)(?:\s*\(.*\))?$",
        # Pattern 6 (text)       : T-{text_underscore}        → T-GEN_TRUCK, T-YT10 (TIP)
        "regex_text":       r"^T-([A-Z0-9_]+)$"
    },
    "weight_class_thresholds": [
        (0,     "WC1"),
        (10000, "WC2"),
        (15000, "WC3"),
        (20000, "WC4"),
        (25000, "WC5"),
    ],
    "equip_class_map": {
        "2200":"2200","2210":"2200","2270":"2270","4260":"4260","4400":"4500","4500":"4500",
        "4510":"4500","4530":"4530","22G0":"2200","22G1":"2200","22G2":"2200","22P3":"2260",
        "22R1":"2230","22T0":"2270","22T6":"2270","22U0":"2250","22U1":"2250","22V0":"2200",
        "25G1":"2500","42G0":"4200","42G1":"4200","42P0":"4260","42P2":"4260","42P3":"4260",
        "42U0":"4250","42U1":"4250","42U5":"4250","45G0":"4500","45G1":"4500","45P3":"4560",
        "45R0":"4530","45R1":"4530","45R4":"4530","45U0":"4550","45U1":"4520","4EG1":"4550",
        "L5G0":"9500","L5G1":"9500","LEG0":"9500","LEG1":"9500"}
    }

}

# Get configuration for current terminal
if client_id not in TERMINAL_CONFIG:
    raise ValueError(f"No configuration found for terminal: {client_id}")

config = TERMINAL_CONFIG[client_id]
client_key = config['client_key']

# Extract column mappings 
column_mappings = config.get('column_mappings', {})
hazardous_col = column_mappings.get('unit_hazardous', 'Unit Hazardous:0')

# Extract lookup configs ───────────────────────────────────────────
weight_class_thresholds = config.get('weight_class_thresholds', [])
equip_class_map         = config.get('equip_class_map', {})





# Paths
bronze_path = f"abfss://{file_system}@{storage_account}.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/workinstruction/load/"
bronze_archive_path = f"abfss://{file_system}@{storage_account}.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/workinstruction/archive/"
silver_path = f"abfss://workinstruction@{storage_account}.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/{terminal_folder}/"
gold_path = f"abfss://workinstruction@{storage_account}.dfs.core.windows.net/gold/WI_AllTerminals/"


print(f"🔄 Processing Terminal: {client_id}")
print(f"📂 Bronze Load Path: {bronze_path}")
print(f"📂 Silver Path: {silver_path}")
print(f"\n⚙️ Terminal Configuration:")
print(f"   • DateTime Formats: {len(config['datetime_formats'])} format(s)")
print(f"   • Yard Prefix: {config['yard_position']['prefix']}")
print(f"   • Yard Tier Type: {config['yard_position']['tier_type']}")
print(f"   • Vessel Prefix: {config['vessel_position']['prefix']}")
print(f"   • Vessel Tier Type: {config['vessel_position']['tier_type']}")
print(f"   • Hazardous Column: {hazardous_col}")
print(f"🔑 Client Key: {client_key}")

# ============================================================
# REGISTER LOOKUP TABLES FROM CONFIG
# ============================================================
from pyspark.sql import Row

# Weight class lookup table
wc_rows = [Row(min_kg=float(t[0]), weight_class=t[1]) 
           for t in weight_class_thresholds]
wc_df = spark.createDataFrame(wc_rows)
wc_df.createOrReplaceTempView("weight_class_lookup")

# Equipment class lookup table
ec_rows = [Row(unit_type_iso=k, equip_class=v) 
           for k, v in equip_class_map.items()]
ec_df = spark.createDataFrame(ec_rows)
ec_df.createOrReplaceTempView("equip_class_lookup")

print(f"✅ Registered weight_class_lookup: {len(wc_rows)} brackets")
print(f"✅ Registered equip_class_lookup:  {len(ec_rows)} ISO codes")

# ============================================================
# READ BRONZE CSV FILES
# ============================================================

from pyspark.sql.functions import input_file_name
from notebookutils import mssparkutils

try:
    files = mssparkutils.fs.ls(bronze_path)
    csv_files = [f for f in files if f.name.startswith("workinstruction") and f.name.endswith(".csv")]
    
    if len(csv_files) == 0:
        print("⚠️ No CSV files found in Bronze load folder. Exiting.")
        mssparkutils.notebook.exit('{"status": "NO_FILES", "message": "No CSV files found"}')
    
    print(f"📁 Found {len(csv_files)} CSV file(s):")
    for f in csv_files:
        print(f"   • {f.name}")
        
except Exception as e:
    print(f"❌ Error accessing Bronze folder: {str(e)}")
    raise

bronze_df = spark.read \
    .option("header", "true") \
    .option("inferSchema", "false") \
    .option("delimiter", ",") \
    .option("quote", '"') \
    .option("escape", "\\") \
    .csv(f"{bronze_path}workinstruction*.csv") \
    .withColumn("source_file_name_full", input_file_name())

record_count = bronze_df.count()
print(f"\n✅ Loaded {record_count:,} records from Bronze")

bronze_df.createOrReplaceTempView("bronze_wi")

query = f"""
CREATE OR REPLACE TEMP VIEW standardized_wi AS
SELECT 
    `Unit V-State` AS unit_v_state,
    `Assigned Crane` AS assigned_crane,
    `Intended CHE` AS intended_che,
    `State Fetch` AS state_fetch,
    `Unit Type Length` AS unit_type_length,
    `Unit VGM (kg)` AS unit_vgm__kg,
    `Unit uyvGkey` AS unit_uyvgkey,
    `WI Created` AS wi_created_str,
    `WI Modified` AS wi_modified_str,
    `Dest Tz` AS dest_tz,
    `Unit POL` AS unit_pol,
    `Unit Position` AS unit_position,
    `Unit Rfr Type` AS unit_rfr_type,
    `Unit Sparcs Notes` AS unit_sparcs_notes,
    `Unit Stow` AS unit_stow,
    `Unit Stow 2` AS unit_stow_2,
    `Unit Stow 3` AS unit_stow_3,
    `Unit Type ISO` AS unit_type_iso,
    `Unit I/B Actual Visit` AS unit_i_b_actual_visit,
    `Unit Impediments Road` AS unit_impediments_road,
    `Unit Impediments Rail` AS unit_impediments_rail,
    `Unit Impediments Vessel` AS unit_impediments_vessel,
    `Unit ISO Grp` AS unit_iso_grp,
    `Unit Is OOG` AS unit_is_oog,
    `Unit Last Free Day` AS unit_last_free_day,
    `Unit Line Op` AS unit_line_op,
    `Unit Loaded` AS unit_loaded,
    `Unit Must be On-Power` AS unit_must_be_on_power,
    `Unit O/B Actual Visit` AS unit_o_b_actual_visit,
    `Unit On Power` AS unit_on_power,
    `Unit POD` AS unit_pod,
    `Unit Dest` AS unit_dest,
    `{hazardous_col}` AS unit_hazardous_0,
    `Unit Damage Severity` AS unit_damage_severity,
    `Unit Category` AS unit_category,
    Locked AS locked,
    `MVHS Time Fetch` AS mvhs_time_fetch_str,
    `State Itv Dispatch` AS state_itv_dispatch,
    Modifier AS modifier,
    `Twist Lock` AS twist_lock,
    `Unit Arrival Booking Number` AS unit_arrival_booking_number,
    `Unit AutoStrad Suitable` AS unit_autostrad_suitable,
    `Unit Arrival Position` AS unit_arrival_position,
    push_rate AS push_rate,
    Queue AS queue,
    mvhs_t_carry_complete AS mvhs_t_carry_complete_str,
    `MVHS Pool Time Put` AS mvhs_pool_time_put_str,
    `EC Hold` AS ec_hold,
    `N4 To Complete` AS n4_to_complete,
    `Nominated CHE` AS nominated_che,
    `Pushrate Offset` AS pushrate_offset,
    `MVHS Time Carry CHE Dispatch` AS mvhs_time_carry_che_dispatch_str,
    `MVHS Rehandle Count` AS mvhs_rehandle_count,
    `Laden Disp. Requested` AS laden_disp__requested,
    Definite AS definite,
    `Confirmed Stage` AS confirmed_stage,
    `Assigned Crane CHE Name` AS assigned_crane_che_name,
    `Unit T-State` AS unit_t_state,
    `Unit Nbr` AS unit_nbr,
    `Yard Move Deadline` AS yard_move_deadline_str,
    Stage AS stage,
    Kind AS kind,
    `WI Position` AS wi_position,
    `Actual Sequence` AS actual_sequence,
    Carrier AS carrier,
    `POW Pow Name` AS pow_pow_name,
    `Queue Seq.` AS queue_seq,
    `MVHS Fetch CHE Id` AS mvhs_fetch_che_id,
    `MVHS Carry CHE Id` AS mvhs_carry_che_id,
    `MVHS Put CHE Id` AS mvhs_put_che_id,
    `Est Mv Time` AS est_mv_time_str,
    status AS status,
    `Twin Fetch` AS twin_fetch,
    `Twin Carry` AS twin_carry,
    `Twin Put` AS twin_put,
    source_file_name_full
FROM bronze_wi
"""

spark.sql(query)
print("✅ standardized_wi view created")

# Check each transformation step
print("1. Bronze layer:")
spark.sql("SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM bronze_wi").show()

print("2. After standardization:")
spark.sql("SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM standardized_wi").show()

print("3. After date parsing:")
spark.sql("SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM parsed_dates").show()

print("4. After position parsing:")
spark.sql("SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM with_positions").show()

print("5. After derived columns (with_derived):")
spark.sql("SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM with_derived").show()

print("6. Check integration_key NULLs in with_derived:")
spark.sql("""
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) as total,
        COUNT(integration_key) as non_null_integration_key,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN integration_key IS NULL THEN 1 END) as null_integration_key
    FROM with_derived
""").show()

# ============================================================
# DYNAMIC DATE/TIME PARSING
# Build SQL based on terminal configuration
# ============================================================

from pyspark.sql.functions import col, coalesce, to_timestamp

# Get datetime formats for this terminal
datetime_formats = config['datetime_formats']

# Build COALESCE statement for each datetime column
datetime_columns = [
    'wi_created_str',
    'wi_modified_str',
    'yard_move_deadline_str',
    'mvhs_t_carry_complete_str',
    'mvhs_time_fetch_str',
    'mvhs_pool_time_put_str',
    'est_mv_time_str',
    'mvhs_time_carry_che_dispatch_str'
]

# Read standardized data
parsed_df = spark.sql("SELECT * FROM standardized_wi")

# Apply datetime parsing for each column
for dt_col in datetime_columns:
    target_col = dt_col.replace('_str', '')
    
    # Build list of to_timestamp attempts using PySpark functions
    timestamp_attempts = [
        to_timestamp(col(dt_col), fmt) for fmt in datetime_formats
    ]
    
    # Apply COALESCE
    parsed_df = parsed_df.withColumn(target_col, coalesce(*timestamp_attempts))

parsed_df.createOrReplaceTempView("parsed_dates")

print(f"✅ Applied {len(datetime_formats)} datetime format(s) for {len(datetime_columns)} columns")

# ============================================================
# HELPER FUNCTION: POSITION PARSING
# ============================================================

from pyspark.sql.functions import (
    col, when, lit, substring, regexp_extract,
    trim, concat, expr
)

def parse_position(df, input_col, output_prefix, yard_config, vessel_config,
                   truck_config=None, rail_config=None):
    """
    Parses a position column into structured components.

    Reads terminal-specific regex patterns and metadata from TERMINAL_CONFIG
    and builds PySpark expressions dynamically.

    Both Malta and GPA have identical group structure:
        Group 1 → terminal code (e.g. MFT, GCT) — skipped via group_offset = 1
        Group 2 → Bay
        Group 3 → Row
        Group 4 → Tier
        Group 5 → Height/Tier value (raw)

    Malta example : Y-MFT-1A 003 02C F  → separator = ' ', tier_type = 'letter'
    GPA example   : Y-GCT-108.030.E.3   → separator = '.', tier_type = 'number'

    Truck positions support multiple formats (GPA):
        Pattern 1 (TIP)        : T-{ID}-TIP-{letter}   → T-3004272-TIP-Y
        Pattern 2 (suffix)     : T-{ID}-{letter} (OUT) → T-3001804-Y (OUT)
        Pattern 3 (num_suffix) : T-{ID}-{number} (*)   → T-600-2 (TIP)
        Pattern 4 (plain)      : T-{ID} or T-{ID} (*)  → T-3001804, T-2978170 (OUT)
        Pattern 5 (text)       : T-{text_underscore}   → T-GEN_TRUCK

    group_offset = 1 for both Malta and GPA since both have a leading
    terminal code capture group before the actual position data.
    If a future terminal has NO leading group, set group_offset = 0.

    Args:
        df            : Input DataFrame
        input_col     : Source column name ('unit_position' or 'wi_position')
        output_prefix : Prefix for all output columns
        yard_config   : yard_position dict from TERMINAL_CONFIG
        vessel_config : vessel_position dict from TERMINAL_CONFIG
        truck_config  : Optional truck_position dict from TERMINAL_CONFIG
        rail_config   : Optional rail_position dict from TERMINAL_CONFIG

    Output columns added:
        {output_prefix}_type     → Position type first character: Y, V, T, R
        {output_prefix}_1        → Bay / Equipment ID
        {output_prefix}_2        → Bay.Row / ID-Suffix
        {output_prefix}_3        → Bay.Row.Tier (yard/vessel only)
        {output_prefix}_4        → Raw tier/height value (yard/vessel/truck TIP only)
        {output_prefix}_tier_num → Tier as integer
                                   letter tier : ascii(X) - ascii('A') + 1
                                   number tier : cast as int
                                   truck/rail  : fixed 0

    Verified against:
        Malta : Y-MFT-1A 003 02C F   → _1=1A,        _2=1A 003,      _3=1A 003 02C, _4=F,   tier_num=6
        GPA   : Y-GCT-108.030.E.3    → _1=108,       _2=108.030,     _3=108.030.E,  _4=3,   tier_num=3
        Truck : T-3004272-TIP-Y      → _1=3004272,   _2=3004272-TIP,                _4=Y,   tier_num=0
        Truck : T-3001804-Y (OUT)    → _1=3001804,   _2=3001804-Y,                  _4='',  tier_num=0
        Truck : T-600-2 (TIP)        → _1=600,       _2=600-2,                      _4='',  tier_num=0
        Truck : T-2978170 (OUT)      → _1=2978170,   _2=2978170,                    _4='',  tier_num=0
        Truck : T-GEN_TRUCK          → _1=GEN_TRUCK, _2=GEN_TRUCK,                  _4='',  tier_num=0
        Rail  : R-CP527008-AB1       → _1=CP527008,  _2=CP527008-AB1,               _4='',  tier_num=0
    """

    separator  = yard_config.get('separator', ' ')
    yard_pfx   = yard_config['prefix']
    vessel_pfx = vessel_config['prefix']
    vessel_rx  = vessel_config['regex']

    # ── Resolve yard regex patterns & group_offset ────────────────
    # group_offset shifts all regex group reads past the leading
    # terminal code capture group present in both Malta and GPA.
    #
    # Malta regex_full: ^Y-([A-Z0-9]+)-([A-Z0-9]+)\s([A-Z0-9]+)\s([A-Z0-9]+)([A-Z])$
    #                       group1=MFT   group2=Bay   group3=Row   group4=Tier  group5=F
    #
    # GPA   regex_full: ^Y-([A-Z0-9]+)-([0-9]+)\.([0-9]+)\.([A-Z])\.([0-9]+)$
    #                       group1=GCT   group2=Bay group3=Row group4=Tier group5=3
    #
    # Both → group_offset = 1, data starts at group 2
    # The if/else only resolves which regex strings to use.

    if 'patterns' in yard_config:
        # Multi-pattern terminal (e.g. GPA)
        yard_regex_full  = yard_config['patterns'][0]['regex']
        yard_regex_short = next(
            (p['regex'] for p in yard_config['patterns'] if p['name'] == 'simple_location'),
            yard_config['patterns'][-1]['regex']
        )
        group_offset = 1  # GPA: group 1 = terminal code, data starts at group 2
    else:
        # Single-pattern terminal (e.g. Malta)
        yard_regex_full  = yard_config['regex_full']
        yard_regex_short = yard_config['regex_short']
        group_offset = 1  # Malta: group 1 = terminal code, data starts at group 2

    # ── Resolve truck regex patterns ──────────────────────────────
    # Five patterns evaluated in order — first match wins:
    #   truck_rx            : T-{ID}-TIP-{letter}   strict TIP with lane letter
    #   truck_rx_suffix     : T-{ID}-{letter} (*)   letter suffix before optional tag
    #   truck_rx_num_suffix : T-{ID}-{number} (*)   number suffix before optional tag
    #   truck_rx_plain      : T-{ID} or T-{ID} (*)  plain ID with optional tag in parens
    #   truck_rx_text       : T-{text_underscore}   text ID with underscores
    truck_pfx           = truck_config['prefix']                    if truck_config else ''
    truck_rx            = truck_config.get('regex',            '')  if truck_config else ''
    truck_rx_suffix     = truck_config.get('regex_suffix',     '')  if truck_config else ''
    truck_rx_num_suffix = truck_config.get('regex_num_suffix', '')  if truck_config else ''
    truck_rx_plain      = truck_config.get('regex_plain',      '')  if truck_config else ''
    truck_rx_text       = truck_config.get('regex_text',       '')  if truck_config else ''
    truck_rx_num_letter = truck_config.get('regex_num_letter', '') if truck_config else ''


    # ── Resolve rail regex pattern ────────────────────────────────
    rail_pfx = rail_config['prefix']         if rail_config else ''
    rail_rx  = rail_config.get('regex', '')  if rail_config else ''

    c = trim(col(input_col))  # trimmed column reference, reused throughout

    # ── Position Type ──────────────────────────────────────────────
    # First character identifies position type: Y=Yard, V=Vessel, T=Truck, R=Rail
    df = df.withColumn(
        f"{output_prefix}_type",
        substring(c, 1, 1)
    )

    # ── Position 1: Bay / Equipment ID ────────────────────────────
    # Yard full  → group (1 + offset) = Bay
    #   Malta    : Y-MFT-1A 003 02C F → 1A
    #   GPA      : Y-GCT-108.030.E.3  → 108
    # Yard short → group (1 + offset) = Block/Location code
    # Vessel     → first 2 chars of group 2
    # Truck P1   : T-{ID}-TIP-{letter}   → ID
    # Truck P2   : T-{ID}-{letter} (*)   → ID
    # Truck P3   : T-{ID}-{number} (*)   → ID
    # Truck P4   : T-{ID} or T-{ID} (*)  → ID
    # Truck P5   : T-{text_underscore}   → text ID
    # Rail       : group 1 = operator/track code
    pos1 = (
        when(
            (c.startswith(yard_pfx)) & (expr(f"locate('{separator}', trim({input_col}))") > 0),
            regexp_extract(c, yard_regex_full, 1 + group_offset)
        )
        .when(
            (c.startswith(yard_pfx)) & (expr(f"locate('{separator}', trim({input_col}))") == 0),
            regexp_extract(c, yard_regex_short, 1 + group_offset)
        )
        .when(
            c.startswith(vessel_pfx),
            substring(regexp_extract(c, vessel_rx, 2), 1, 2)
        )
    )
    if truck_config:
        pos1 = (
            pos1
            .when(c.startswith(truck_pfx) & (regexp_extract(c, truck_rx,            1) != ''), regexp_extract(c, truck_rx,            1))  # T-{ID}-TIP-{letter}
            .when(c.startswith(truck_pfx) & (regexp_extract(c, truck_rx_suffix,     1) != ''), regexp_extract(c, truck_rx_suffix,     1))  # T-{ID}-{letter} (*)
            .when(c.startswith(truck_pfx) & (regexp_extract(c, truck_rx_num_letter, 1) != ''), regexp_extract(c, truck_rx_num_letter, 1))  # T-{ID}-{num}-{letter} ← NEW
            .when(c.startswith(truck_pfx) & (regexp_extract(c, truck_rx_num_suffix, 1) != ''), regexp_extract(c, truck_rx_num_suffix, 1))  # T-{ID}-{number} (*)
            .when(c.startswith(truck_pfx) & (regexp_extract(c, truck_rx_plain,      1) != ''), regexp_extract(c, truck_rx_plain,      1))  # T-{ID} / T-{ID} (*)
            .when(c.startswith(truck_pfx) & (regexp_extract(c, truck_rx_text,       1) != ''), regexp_extract(c, truck_rx_text,       1))  # T-GEN_TRUCK
        )

    if rail_config:
        pos1 = pos1.when(c.startswith(rail_pfx), regexp_extract(c, rail_rx, 1))

    df = df.withColumn(f"{output_prefix}_1", pos1.otherwise(lit('')))

    # ── Position 2: Bay.Row / ID-Suffix ───────────────────────────
    # Yard full  → "Bay{sep}Row"
    #   Malta    : Y-MFT-1A 003 02C F → "1A 003"
    #   GPA      : Y-GCT-108.030.E.3  → "108.030"
    # Yard short → same as position 1 (only block/location known)
    # Vessel     → full slot string from group 2
    # Truck P1   : T-{ID}-TIP-{letter}   → ID-TIP
    # Truck P2   : T-{ID}-{letter} (*)   → ID-{letter}
    # Truck P3   : T-{ID}-{number} (*)   → ID-{number}
    # Truck P4   : T-{ID} or T-{ID} (*)  → ID only (no suffix to append)
    # Truck P5   : T-{text_underscore}   → text ID only
    # Rail       : "group1-group2"
    pos2 = (
        when(
            (c.startswith(yard_pfx)) & (expr(f"locate('{separator}', trim({input_col}))") > 0),
            concat(
                regexp_extract(c, yard_regex_full, 1 + group_offset),
                lit(separator),
                regexp_extract(c, yard_regex_full, 2 + group_offset)
            )
        )
        .when(
            (c.startswith(yard_pfx)) & (expr(f"locate('{separator}', trim({input_col}))") == 0),
            regexp_extract(c, yard_regex_short, 1 + group_offset)
        )
        .when(
            c.startswith(vessel_pfx),
            regexp_extract(c, vessel_rx, 2)
        )
    )
    if truck_config:
        pos2 = (
            pos2
            .when(c.startswith(truck_pfx) & (regexp_extract(c, truck_rx,            1) != ''), concat(regexp_extract(c, truck_rx,            1), lit('-'), regexp_extract(c, truck_rx,            2)))  # ID-TIP
            .when(c.startswith(truck_pfx) & (regexp_extract(c, truck_rx_suffix,     1) != ''), concat(regexp_extract(c, truck_rx_suffix,     1), lit('-'), regexp_extract(c, truck_rx_suffix,     2)))  # ID-{letter}
            .when(c.startswith(truck_pfx) & (regexp_extract(c, truck_rx_num_letter, 1) != ''), concat(regexp_extract(c, truck_rx_num_letter, 1), lit('-'), regexp_extract(c, truck_rx_num_letter, 2)))  # ID-{num} ← NEW
            .when(c.startswith(truck_pfx) & (regexp_extract(c, truck_rx_num_suffix, 1) != ''), concat(regexp_extract(c, truck_rx_num_suffix, 1), lit('-'), regexp_extract(c, truck_rx_num_suffix, 2)))  # ID-{number}
            .when(c.startswith(truck_pfx) & (regexp_extract(c, truck_rx_plain,      1) != ''), regexp_extract(c, truck_rx_plain,      1))                                                              # ID only
            .when(c.startswith(truck_pfx) & (regexp_extract(c, truck_rx_text,       1) != ''), regexp_extract(c, truck_rx_text,       1))                                                              # GEN_TRUCK
        )

    if rail_config:
        pos2 = pos2.when(c.startswith(rail_pfx), concat(regexp_extract(c, rail_rx, 1), lit('-'), regexp_extract(c, rail_rx, 2)))

    df = df.withColumn(f"{output_prefix}_2", pos2.otherwise(lit('')))

    # ── Position 3: Bay.Row.Tier ───────────────────────────────────
    # Yard full  → "Bay{sep}Row{sep}Tier"
    #   Malta    : Y-MFT-1A 003 02C F → "1A 003 02C"
    #   GPA      : Y-GCT-108.030.E.3  → "108.030.E"
    # Yard short → no tier known, falls through to otherwise('')
    # Vessel     → first 4 chars of group 2 (Bay+Row portion)
    # Truck      → '' (no tier concept)
    # Rail       → '' (no tier concept)
    pos3 = (
        when(
            (c.startswith(yard_pfx)) & (expr(f"locate('{separator}', trim({input_col}))") > 0),
            concat(
                regexp_extract(c, yard_regex_full, 1 + group_offset),
                lit(separator),
                regexp_extract(c, yard_regex_full, 2 + group_offset),
                lit(separator),
                regexp_extract(c, yard_regex_full, 3 + group_offset)
            )
        )
        .when(
            c.startswith(vessel_pfx),
            substring(regexp_extract(c, vessel_rx, 2), 1, 4)
        )
    )
    if truck_config: pos3 = pos3.when(c.startswith(truck_pfx), lit(''))
    if rail_config:  pos3 = pos3.when(c.startswith(rail_pfx),  lit(''))
    df = df.withColumn(f"{output_prefix}_3", pos3.otherwise(lit('')))

    # ── Position 4: Raw Tier / Height value ───────────────────────
    # Yard full  → group (4 + offset) = raw tier value
    #   Malta    : Y-MFT-1A 003 02C F → "F"  (letter → tier_num=6)
    #   GPA      : Y-GCT-108.030.E.3  → "3"  (number → tier_num=3)
    # Vessel     → last 2 chars of group 2
    # Truck P1   : T-{ID}-TIP-{letter} → lane letter e.g. "Y"
    # Truck P2-5 : '' (no tier/lane info available)
    # Rail       → '' (no tier)
    pos4 = (
        when(
            (c.startswith(yard_pfx)) & (expr(f"locate('{separator}', trim({input_col}))") > 0),
            regexp_extract(c, yard_regex_full, 4 + group_offset)
        )
        .when(
            c.startswith(vessel_pfx),
            expr(f"right(regexp_extract(trim({input_col}), '{vessel_rx}', 2), 2)")
        )
    )
    if truck_config:
        pos4 = (
            pos4
            .when(c.startswith(truck_pfx) & (regexp_extract(c, truck_rx,            1) != ''), regexp_extract(c, truck_rx,            3))  # TIP → lane letter group 3
            .when(c.startswith(truck_pfx) & (regexp_extract(c, truck_rx_num_letter, 1) != ''), regexp_extract(c, truck_rx_num_letter, 3))  # {num}-{letter} → lane letter group 3 ← NEW
            .when(c.startswith(truck_pfx), lit(''))                                                                                        # all other patterns → ''
        )

    if rail_config:
        pos4 = pos4.when(c.startswith(rail_pfx), lit(''))

    df = df.withColumn(f"{output_prefix}_4", pos4.otherwise(lit('')))

    # ── Tier Number: convert raw tier to integer ───────────────────
    # letter tier (Malta): ascii arithmetic → "A"=1, "B"=2 ... "F"=6
    # number tier (GPA)  : direct cast     → "3"=3
    # Vessel             : always numeric cast
    # Truck / Rail       : fixed 0 (no stacking concept)
    tier_type = yard_config.get('tier_type', 'number')
    yard_tier = (
        expr(f"ascii({output_prefix}_4) - ascii('A') + 1")
        if tier_type == 'letter'
        else col(f"{output_prefix}_4").cast("int")
    )

    tier = (
        when(
            (col(f"{output_prefix}_type") == yard_pfx) & (col(f"{output_prefix}_4") != ''),
            yard_tier
        )
        .when(
            (col(f"{output_prefix}_type") == vessel_pfx) & (col(f"{output_prefix}_4") != ''),
            col(f"{output_prefix}_4").cast("int")
        )
    )
    if truck_config: tier = tier.when(col(f"{output_prefix}_type") == truck_pfx, lit(0))
    if rail_config:  tier = tier.when(col(f"{output_prefix}_type") == rail_pfx,  lit(0))

  
    base_prefix = output_prefix.split('_')[0]
    df = df.withColumn(f"{base_prefix}_tier_num", tier.otherwise(lit(0)))


    return df

# ============================================================
# DYNAMIC POSITION PARSING
# ============================================================

position_df = spark.sql("SELECT * FROM parsed_dates")

# Extract position configs from terminal config
yard_config   = config['yard_position']
vessel_config = config['vessel_position']
truck_config  = config.get('truck_position', None)
rail_config   = config.get('rail_position',  None)
separator = yard_config.get('separtor', ' ')

# Parse both position columns using the same function and config
for input_col, output_prefix in [
    ("unit_position", "unit_position"),
    ("wi_position",   "wi_position")
]:
    position_df = parse_position(
        df            = position_df,
        input_col     = input_col,
        output_prefix = output_prefix,
        yard_config   = yard_config,
        vessel_config = vessel_config,
        truck_config  = truck_config,
        rail_config   = rail_config
    )

position_df.createOrReplaceTempView("with_positions")

print(f"✅ Position parsing completed for terminal: {client_id}")
supported_types = "Y, V"
if truck_config: supported_types += ", T"
if rail_config:  supported_types += ", R"
print(f"   Supported position types: {supported_types}")
print(f"   Separator: '{separator}'")

# ============================================================
# DYNAMIC POSITION PARSING
# Build position parsing based on terminal configuration
# ============================================================

from pyspark.sql.functions import (
    expr, when, col, substring, length, 
    regexp_extract, trim, concat, lit, coalesce
)

# Get position configuration
yard_config = config['yard_position']
vessel_config = config['vessel_position']
truck_config = config.get('truck_position', {})  # Optional
rail_config = config.get('rail_position', {})    # Optional

# Read parsed dates
position_df = spark.sql("SELECT * FROM parsed_dates")

# ============================================================
# Define regex patterns and separator
# ============================================================

# Handle multi-pattern vs single-pattern yard config
if 'patterns' in yard_config:
    # Multi-pattern config (GCT style)
    yard_patterns = yard_config['patterns']
    yard_regex_full = yard_patterns[0]['regex']
    yard_regex_short = next((p['regex'] for p in yard_patterns if p['name'] == 'simple_location'), yard_patterns[-1]['regex'])
    # For multi-pattern, skip first group (terminal code)
    skip_terminal_code = True
    group_offset = 1  # Groups start at 2 
else:
    # Single pattern config (Malta style)
    yard_regex_full = yard_config['regex_full']
    yard_regex_short = yard_config['regex_short']
    skip_terminal_code = False
    group_offset = 1  # Groups start at 2

vessel_regex = vessel_config['regex']
truck_regex = truck_config.get('regex', '') if truck_config else ''
rail_regex = rail_config.get('regex', '') if rail_config else ''

# Separator: space (Malta) or dot (GCT) or other
separator = yard_config.get('separator', ' ')  # Default to space

# ============================================================
# UNIT POSITION PARSING
# ============================================================

# Position Type (first character)
position_df = position_df.withColumn(
    "unit_position_type",
    substring(trim(col("unit_position")), 1, 1)
)

# ============================================================
# Position 1: Bay (617 for GCT, 1T for Malta)
# ============================================================
unit_pos_1 = when(
    (trim(col("unit_position")).startswith(yard_config['prefix'])) & 
    (expr(f"locate('{separator}', trim(unit_position))") > 0),
    regexp_extract(trim(col("unit_position")), yard_regex_full, 1 + group_offset)
).when(
    (trim(col("unit_position")).startswith(yard_config['prefix'])) & 
    (expr(f"locate('{separator}', trim(unit_position))") == 0),
    regexp_extract(trim(col("unit_position")), yard_regex_short, 1 + group_offset)
).when(
    trim(col("unit_position")).startswith(vessel_config['prefix']),
    substring(regexp_extract(trim(col("unit_position")), vessel_regex, 2), 1, 2)
)

if truck_regex:
    unit_pos_1 = unit_pos_1.when(
        trim(col("unit_position")).startswith(truck_config['prefix']),
        regexp_extract(trim(col("unit_position")), truck_regex, 1)
    )

if rail_regex:
    unit_pos_1 = unit_pos_1.when(
        trim(col("unit_position")).startswith(rail_config['prefix']),
        regexp_extract(trim(col("unit_position")), rail_regex, 1)
    )

position_df = position_df.withColumn("unit_position_1", unit_pos_1.otherwise(''))

# ============================================================
# Position 2: Bay.Row (617.018 for GCT, 1T 009 for Malta)
# ============================================================
unit_pos_2 = when(
    (trim(col("unit_position")).startswith(yard_config['prefix'])) & 
    (expr(f"locate('{separator}', trim(unit_position))") > 0),
    concat(
        regexp_extract(trim(col("unit_position")), yard_regex_full, 1 + group_offset),
        lit(separator),
        regexp_extract(trim(col("unit_position")), yard_regex_full, 2 + group_offset)
    )
).when(
    (trim(col("unit_position")).startswith(yard_config['prefix'])) & 
    (expr(f"locate('{separator}', trim(unit_position))") == 0),
    regexp_extract(trim(col("unit_position")), yard_regex_short, 1 + group_offset)
).when(
    trim(col("unit_position")).startswith(vessel_config['prefix']),
    regexp_extract(trim(col("unit_position")), vessel_regex, 2)
)

if truck_regex:
    unit_pos_2 = unit_pos_2.when(
        trim(col("unit_position")).startswith(truck_config['prefix']),
        concat(
            regexp_extract(trim(col("unit_position")), truck_regex, 1),
            lit('-'),
            regexp_extract(trim(col("unit_position")), truck_regex, 2)
        )
    )

if rail_regex:
    unit_pos_2 = unit_pos_2.when(
        trim(col("unit_position")).startswith(rail_config['prefix']),
        concat(
            regexp_extract(trim(col("unit_position")), rail_regex, 1),
            lit('-'),
            regexp_extract(trim(col("unit_position")), rail_regex, 2)
        )
    )

position_df = position_df.withColumn("unit_position_2", unit_pos_2.otherwise(''))

# ============================================================
# Position 3: Bay.Row.Tier (617.018.Q for GCT, 1T 009 01 for Malta)
# ============================================================
unit_pos_3 = when(
    (trim(col("unit_position")).startswith(yard_config['prefix'])) & 
    (expr(f"locate('{separator}', trim(unit_position))") > 0),
    concat(
        regexp_extract(trim(col("unit_position")), yard_regex_full, 1 + group_offset),
        lit(separator),
        regexp_extract(trim(col("unit_position")), yard_regex_full, 2 + group_offset),
        lit(separator),
        regexp_extract(trim(col("unit_position")), yard_regex_full, 3 + group_offset)
    )
).when(
    trim(col("unit_position")).startswith(vessel_config['prefix']),
    substring(regexp_extract(trim(col("unit_position")), vessel_regex, 2), 1, 4)
)

if truck_regex:
    unit_pos_3 = unit_pos_3.when(
        trim(col("unit_position")).startswith(truck_config['prefix']),
        lit('')
    )

if rail_regex:
    unit_pos_3 = unit_pos_3.when(
        trim(col("unit_position")).startswith(rail_config['prefix']),
        lit('')
    )

position_df = position_df.withColumn("unit_position_3", unit_pos_3.otherwise(''))

# ============================================================
# Position 4: Height/Tier (1 for GCT, B for Malta)
# ============================================================
unit_pos_4 = when(
    (trim(col("unit_position")).startswith(yard_config['prefix'])) & 
    (expr(f"locate('{separator}', trim(unit_position))") > 0),
    regexp_extract(trim(col("unit_position")), yard_regex_full, 4 + group_offset)
).when(
    trim(col("unit_position")).startswith(vessel_config['prefix']),
    expr(f"right(regexp_extract(trim(unit_position), '{vessel_regex}', 2), 2)")
)

if truck_regex:
    unit_pos_4 = unit_pos_4.when(
        trim(col("unit_position")).startswith(truck_config['prefix']),
        regexp_extract(trim(col("unit_position")), truck_regex, 3)
    )

if rail_regex:
    unit_pos_4 = unit_pos_4.when(
        trim(col("unit_position")).startswith(rail_config['prefix']),
        lit('')
    )

position_df = position_df.withColumn("unit_position_4", unit_pos_4.otherwise(''))

# ============================================================
# Tier Number
# ============================================================
tier_num = when(
    (col("unit_position_type") == yard_config['prefix']) & (col("unit_position_4") != ''),
    expr("ascii(unit_position_4) - ascii('A') + 1") if yard_config.get('tier_type') == 'letter' 
    else expr("cast(unit_position_4 as int)")
).when(
    (col("unit_position_type") == vessel_config['prefix']) & (col("unit_position_4") != ''),
    expr("cast(unit_position_4 as int)")
)

if truck_config:
    tier_num = tier_num.when(
        col("unit_position_type") == truck_config.get('prefix', 'T'),
        lit(0)
    )

if rail_config:
    tier_num = tier_num.when(
        col("unit_position_type") == rail_config.get('prefix', 'R'),
        lit(0)
    )

position_df = position_df.withColumn("unit_tier_num", tier_num.otherwise(0))

# ============================================================
# WI POSITION PARSING (Same logic with group_offset)
# ============================================================

position_df = position_df.withColumn(
    "wi_position_type", 
    substring(trim(col("wi_position")), 1, 1)
)

# wi_position_1
wi_pos_1 = when(
    (trim(col("wi_position")).startswith(yard_config['prefix'])) & 
    (expr(f"locate('{separator}', trim(wi_position))") > 0),
    regexp_extract(trim(col("wi_position")), yard_regex_full, 1 + group_offset)
).when(
    (trim(col("wi_position")).startswith(yard_config['prefix'])) & 
    (expr(f"locate('{separator}', trim(wi_position))") == 0),
    regexp_extract(trim(col("wi_position")), yard_regex_short, 1 + group_offset)
).when(
    trim(col("wi_position")).startswith(vessel_config['prefix']),
    substring(regexp_extract(trim(col("wi_position")), vessel_regex, 2), 1, 2)
)

if truck_regex:
    wi_pos_1 = wi_pos_1.when(
        trim(col("wi_position")).startswith(truck_config['prefix']),
        regexp_extract(trim(col("wi_position")), truck_regex, 1)
    )

if rail_regex:
    wi_pos_1 = wi_pos_1.when(
        trim(col("wi_position")).startswith(rail_config['prefix']),
        regexp_extract(trim(col("wi_position")), rail_regex, 1)
    )

position_df = position_df.withColumn("wi_position_1", wi_pos_1.otherwise(''))

# wi_position_2
wi_pos_2 = when(
    (trim(col("wi_position")).startswith(yard_config['prefix'])) & 
    (expr(f"locate('{separator}', trim(wi_position))") > 0),
    concat(
        regexp_extract(trim(col("wi_position")), yard_regex_full, 1 + group_offset),
        lit(separator),
        regexp_extract(trim(col("wi_position")), yard_regex_full, 2 + group_offset)
    )
).when(
    (trim(col("wi_position")).startswith(yard_config['prefix'])) & 
    (expr(f"locate('{separator}', trim(wi_position))") == 0),
    regexp_extract(trim(col("wi_position")), yard_regex_short, 1 + group_offset)
).when(
    trim(col("wi_position")).startswith(vessel_config['prefix']),
    regexp_extract(trim(col("wi_position")), vessel_regex, 2)
)

if truck_regex:
    wi_pos_2 = wi_pos_2.when(
        trim(col("wi_position")).startswith(truck_config['prefix']),
        concat(
            regexp_extract(trim(col("wi_position")), truck_regex, 1),
            lit('-'),
            regexp_extract(trim(col("wi_position")), truck_regex, 2)
        )
    )

if rail_regex:
    wi_pos_2 = wi_pos_2.when(
        trim(col("wi_position")).startswith(rail_config['prefix']),
        concat(
            regexp_extract(trim(col("wi_position")), rail_regex, 1),
            lit('-'),
            regexp_extract(trim(col("wi_position")), rail_regex, 2)
        )
    )

position_df = position_df.withColumn("wi_position_2", wi_pos_2.otherwise(''))

# wi_position_3
wi_pos_3 = when(
    (trim(col("wi_position")).startswith(yard_config['prefix'])) & 
    (expr(f"locate('{separator}', trim(wi_position))") > 0),
    concat(
        regexp_extract(trim(col("wi_position")), yard_regex_full, 1 + group_offset),
        lit(separator),
        regexp_extract(trim(col("wi_position")), yard_regex_full, 2 + group_offset),
        lit(separator),
        regexp_extract(trim(col("wi_position")), yard_regex_full, 3 + group_offset)
    )
).when(
    trim(col("wi_position")).startswith(vessel_config['prefix']),
    substring(regexp_extract(trim(col("wi_position")), vessel_regex, 2), 1, 4)
)

if truck_regex:
    wi_pos_3 = wi_pos_3.when(
        trim(col("wi_position")).startswith(truck_config['prefix']),
        lit('')
    )

if rail_regex:
    wi_pos_3 = wi_pos_3.when(
        trim(col("wi_position")).startswith(rail_config['prefix']),
        lit('')
    )

position_df = position_df.withColumn("wi_position_3", wi_pos_3.otherwise(''))

# wi_position_4
wi_pos_4 = when(
    (trim(col("wi_position")).startswith(yard_config['prefix'])) & 
    (expr(f"locate('{separator}', trim(wi_position))") > 0),
    regexp_extract(trim(col("wi_position")), yard_regex_full, 4 + group_offset)
).when(
    trim(col("wi_position")).startswith(vessel_config['prefix']),
    expr(f"right(regexp_extract(trim(wi_position), '{vessel_regex}', 2), 2)")
)

if truck_regex:
    wi_pos_4 = wi_pos_4.when(
        trim(col("wi_position")).startswith(truck_config['prefix']),
        regexp_extract(trim(col("wi_position")), truck_regex, 3)
    )

if rail_regex:
    wi_pos_4 = wi_pos_4.when(
        trim(col("wi_position")).startswith(rail_config['prefix']),
        lit('')
    )

position_df = position_df.withColumn("wi_position_4", wi_pos_4.otherwise(''))

# wi_tier_num
wi_tier_num = when(
    (col("wi_position_type") == yard_config['prefix']) & (col("wi_position_4") != ''),
    expr("ascii(wi_position_4) - ascii('A') + 1") if yard_config.get('tier_type') == 'letter' 
    else expr("cast(wi_position_4 as int)")
).when(
    (col("wi_position_type") == vessel_config['prefix']) & (col("wi_position_4") != ''),
    expr("cast(wi_position_4 as int)")
)

if truck_config:
    wi_tier_num = wi_tier_num.when(
        col("wi_position_type") == truck_config.get('prefix', 'T'),
        lit(0)
    )

if rail_config:
    wi_tier_num = wi_tier_num.when(
        col("wi_position_type") == rail_config.get('prefix', 'R'),
        lit(0)
    )

position_df = position_df.withColumn("wi_tier_num", wi_tier_num.otherwise(0))

# ============================================================
# CREATE TEMP VIEW
# ============================================================
position_df.createOrReplaceTempView("with_positions")

print(f"✅ Position parsing completed for terminal: {client_id}")
supported_types = "Y, V"
if truck_config:
    supported_types += ", T"
if rail_config:
    supported_types += ", R"
print(f"   Supported position types: {supported_types}")
print(f"   Separator: '{separator}'")

# ============================================================
# ADD STOW FACTOR (PySpark - using config lookups)
# ============================================================

from pyspark.sql.functions import (
    col, when, lit, coalesce, concat_ws, cast, trim
)

# Read current state
stow_df = spark.sql("SELECT * FROM with_positions")

# ── Equipment Class Lookup (from config) ─────────────────────────────────
equip_class_map = config.get('equip_class_map', {})

equip_class_expr = coalesce(
    *[when(trim(col("unit_type_iso")) == k, lit(v)) for k, v in equip_class_map.items()],
    col("unit_type_iso")  # fallback to original if no match
)

stow_df = stow_df.withColumn("equip_class", equip_class_expr)

# ── Weight Class Lookup (from config) ────────────────────────────────────
weight_class_thresholds = config.get('weight_class_thresholds', [])

# Sort descending so first match wins (highest bracket)
weight_class_expr = lit(None).cast("string")
for min_kg, wc_label in sorted(weight_class_thresholds, key=lambda x: x[0]):
    weight_class_expr = when(
        col("unit_vgm__kg").cast("double") >= min_kg,
        lit(wc_label)
    ).otherwise(weight_class_expr)

stow_df = stow_df.withColumn("weight_class", weight_class_expr)

# ── Stow Factor ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
stow_df = stow_df.withColumn(
    "stow_factor",
    concat_ws("-",
        col("unit_o_b_actual_visit"),
        col("unit_pod"),
        col("unit_category"),
        col("status"),
        col("equip_class"),
        col("weight_class")
    )
)

# Drop intermediate columns - not needed in output
stow_df = stow_df.drop("equip_class", "weight_class")

# Register for next cell
stow_df.createOrReplaceTempView("with_positions")

#   print(f"✅ Stow factor computed")

# ============================================================
# ADD REMAINING DERIVED COLUMNS
# ============================================================

spark.sql(f"""
CREATE OR REPLACE TEMP VIEW with_derived AS

SELECT 
    *,
    
    -- Integration key
    CONCAT(unit_nbr, '_', DATE_FORMAT(wi_modified, 'ddMMyyyyHHmmss')) AS integration_key,
    
    -- Client identifiers
    '{client_id}' AS client_id,
    {client_key} AS client_key,
    
    -- Load timestamp
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS load_timestamp,
    
    -- Source file name extraction
    REGEXP_EXTRACT(source_file_name_full, '(\\\\d{{8}}_\\\\d{{4}})', 1) AS source_file_name,
    
    -- Source file sort key
    CAST(CONCAT(
        REGEXP_EXTRACT(source_file_name_full, '(\\\\d{{2}})(\\\\d{{2}})(\\\\d{{4}})_(\\\\d{{4}})', 3),
        REGEXP_EXTRACT(source_file_name_full, '(\\\\d{{2}})(\\\\d{{2}})(\\\\d{{4}})_(\\\\d{{4}})', 2),
        REGEXP_EXTRACT(source_file_name_full, '(\\\\d{{2}})(\\\\d{{2}})(\\\\d{{4}})_(\\\\d{{4}})', 1),
        REGEXP_EXTRACT(source_file_name_full, '(\\\\d{{2}})(\\\\d{{2}})(\\\\d{{4}})_(\\\\d{{4}})', 4)
    ) AS BIGINT) AS source_file_name_sort,
    
    -- Date parts
    YEAR(wi_modified) AS year,
    MONTH(wi_modified) AS month,
    WEEKOFYEAR(wi_modified) AS week
     
    
FROM with_positions
""")

print(f"✅ Derived columns added")
print(f"   • client_id: {client_id}")
print(f"   • client_key: {client_key}")

# Check distinct unit_nbr + wi_modified combinations
spark.sql("""
    SELECT 
        COUNT(*) as total_rows,
        COUNT(DISTINCT unit_nbr) as distinct_unit_nbr,
        COUNT(DISTINCT wi_modified) as distinct_wi_modified,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(unit_nbr, '_', DATE_FORMAT(wi_modified, 'ddMMyyyyHHmmss'))) as distinct_combinations
    FROM with_derived
""").show()

%%sql
-- ============================================================
-- DEDUPLICATION
-- Keep latest record per integration_key based on source_file_name_sort
-- ============================================================

CREATE OR REPLACE TEMP VIEW deduplicated AS

SELECT 
    *,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY integration_key 
        ORDER BY source_file_name_sort DESC, wi_modified DESC
    ) AS row_number
FROM with_derived
WHERE integration_key IS NOT NULL

# ============================================================
# WRITE TO SILVER LAYER
# ============================================================

from delta.tables import DeltaTable

try:
    if DeltaTable.isDeltaTable(spark, silver_path):
        # Append new data
        silver_df.write \
            .format("delta") \
            .mode("append") \
            .option("mergeSchema", "true") \
            .save(silver_path)
        
        print(f"✅ Silver: Appended {final_count:,} records for '{client_id}'")
    else:
        # First run - create table
        silver_df.write \
            .format("delta") \
            .mode("overwrite") \
            .option("mergeSchema", "true") \
            .save(silver_path)
        
        print(f"✅ Silver: Created table with {final_count:,} records for '{client_id}'")

except Exception as e:
    print(f"❌ Failed to write to Silver: {str(e)}")
    raise

# ============================================================
# WRITE TO GOLD LAYER (All Terminals - Latest Data)
# ============================================================

import pyspark.sql.functions as F
from delta.tables import DeltaTable

# Get latest file for this terminal
latest_sort = silver_df \
    .agg(F.max("source_file_name_sort")) \
    .collect()[0][0]

# Filter to latest data only
df_gold = silver_df.filter(F.col("source_file_name_sort") == latest_sort)

gold_record_count = df_gold.count()

print(f"📊 Preparing Gold write for terminal: {client_id}")
print(f"   • Latest file sort: {latest_sort}")
print(f"   • Records to write: {gold_record_count:,}")

try:
    if DeltaTable.isDeltaTable(spark, gold_path):
        # Table exists → Use dynamic partition overwrite
        print(f"✅ Gold table exists - using dynamic partition overwrite")
        
        # Dynamic partition overwrite — only touches this terminal's partition
        spark.conf.set("spark.sql.sources.partitionOverwriteMode", "dynamic")
        
        df_gold.write \
            .format("delta") \
            .mode("overwrite") \
            .partitionBy("client_id") \
            .option("mergeSchema", "true") \
            .save(gold_path)
        
        print(f"✅ Gold partition replaced for client_id = '{client_id}'")
        
    else:
        # First run → Create new table with partitioning
        print(f"📦 Gold table does not exist - creating new table")
        
        df_gold.write \
            .format("delta") \
            .mode("overwrite") \
            .partitionBy("client_id") \
            .option("mergeSchema", "true") \
            .save(gold_path)
        
        print(f"✅ Gold table created with data for '{client_id}'")
    
    print(f"📁 Partition: client_id={client_id}")
    print(f"🔢 File sort: {latest_sort}")
    print(f"📊 Records written: {gold_record_count:,}")

except Exception as e:
    print(f"❌ Failed to write to Gold: {str(e)}")
    raise

# ============================================================
# ARCHIVE BRONZE FILES
# ============================================================

from notebookutils import mssparkutils

try:
    files = mssparkutils.fs.ls(bronze_path)
    csv_files = [f for f in files if f.name.startswith("workinstruction") and f.name.endswith(".csv")]
    
    archived_count = 0
    for file in csv_files:
        source = file.path
        destination = f"{bronze_archive_path}{file.name}"
        mssparkutils.fs.mv(source, destination, True)
        print(f"📦 Archived: {file.name}")
        archived_count += 1
    
    print(f"\n✅ Archived {archived_count} file(s)")

except Exception as e:
    print(f"⚠️ Warning: Failed to archive files: {str(e)}")
    # Don't fail the pipeline if archiving fails
